prompt: A static Astro blog with a cyberpunk terminal and tmux-session aesthetic. Generate cinematic but believable scenes with dark charcoal and near-black backgrounds, green phosphor glow, restrained cyan highlights, subtle amber indicator lights, practical monitors, compact home-lab hardware, Linux workstation energy, and real-world desk scale. Favor moody contrast, atmospheric depth, scanline-like light texture, and disciplined composition. Avoid fantasy armor, exaggerated sci-fi cityscapes, excessive magenta, floating holograms, or anything that feels like game splash art. Never include readable text, logos, watermarks, UI overlays, or terminal screenshots with legible words. $
negative_prompt: watermark, logo, signature, blurry, unreadable text, exaggerated sci-fi skyline, fantasy armor, glossy showroom, cluttered collage, oversaturated magenta, duplicated monitors, extra limbs, cartoon style, $ (not desired output)
